text: There is an energy here—a mingling of youthful curiosity and technological seriousness. I am surrounded by the hum of conversation, the reflection of movement in glass, and the distant glow of computer screens. It feels like a threshold between playful discovery and thoughtful study—a liminal space that invites contemplation on how we evolve in tandem with our machines. I feel both a participant and an observer, at home amid the interplay of learning and invention.
